goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should depart from 'birmingham new street' and should go to 'cambridge'.
The train should leave on 'friday' and should 'arrive by 10:45'.
Make sure you get 'departure time', 'price', and 'travel time'.
You are also looking for a 'particular attraction'. Its name is called 'saint john's college'.
Make sure you get 'phone number'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a train. The train should depart from birmingham new street and should go to cambridge
The train should leave on friday and should arrive by 10:45
Make sure you get departure time, price, and travel time
You are also looking for a particular attraction. Its name is called saint john's college
Make sure you get phone number
